name: 32" Maverick Square Industrial Dining Table Teak - Christopher Knight Home
description:
Tie your dining space together with this stunning outdoor dining table. Made for indoor or outdoor use, this table is the perfect centerpiece for all your meals. The slat-paneled acacia wood tabletop brings warmth and natural beauty, while its powder-coated hairpin legs add industrial charm. Modern yet raw and rustic, this table truly has it all, and it's incredibly practical to boot.

MODERN INDUSTRIAL STYLE: Our dining table incorporates powder-coated hairpin legs with rich wood to create an understated modern industrial design.

ACACIA WOOD: This durable hardwood is a solid, heavy frame that naturally withstands the elements and resists wear and tear.

SLAT PANEL DESIGN: The tabletop features beautiful slat paneling, giving it a sophisticated, classic look.

WEATHER RESISTANT: This table is designed and tested to resist mild weather conditions. We always advise covering, storing, or providing other protection to our furniture in the event of heavy or repeated exposure to the elements, including water and UV rays.
